InstructionData.Title: Grow Light Controller 1
InstructionData.Author: Scriptslol
InstructionData.Instructions:
#################################################### # Grow Light Controller ####################################################
define AllGrowLights -1758710260
# POTATO #define LightTime 600 #define SleepTime 200
# TOMATO#define LightTime 480 #define SleepTime 300
# SOYBEAN define LightTime 600 define SleepTime 300
loop:
sb AllGrowLights On 1 sleep LightTime
sb AllGrowLights On 0 sleep SleepTime
j loop
